description: Archived V1.39 plan per Profile B. Moved from status.json on V1.39 P0 closeout (P0 merged to iteration/v1.39; P0.5/P1..P5 still in flight on same integration branch).
title: P0 — auto-chain engine, chapter outer loop, daemon continuity, side-input

metadata.description: P0 — auto-chain engine, chapter outer loop, daemon continuity, side-input
metadata.qc: Initial tri-review (qc1/qc2/qc3) all Approve; consolidated gate Request Changes on 3 medium Warnings (W-A duplication, W-D non-atomic PATCH, W-E missing boot-resume index). Fix wave 2 (5+2 style commits, +383/-140) closed all 3 medium Warnings. Targeted re-review (qc1 W-A, qc2 W-A, qc3 W-D+W-E) all Approve. Final consolidated gate: Approve (0 Critical, 0 unresolved Warning). 3 low-severity Warnings (W-B ID entropy, W-C resume timing, W-F tick scan) deferred to V1.40 hygiene. 2 Suggestions from qc3 re-review registered as residuals.
metadata.qa: skipped per harness convention for the round (initial QC tri-review + targeted re-review + 21 green integration tests + clippy clean + fmt clean + 266 daemon-runtime + 158 local-db tests provide equivalent evidence; QA in Plan iteration sign-off if needed)
shipped: Work table extension: 3 new columns (auto_chain_enabled, auto_chain_interrupted, driver_schedule_id) + migration 202606090001_works_auto_chain_checkpoint.sql + partial index works_auto_chain_resume (W-E)
WorkPatch / WorkRecord / WorkApiDto surface includes the 3 new fields with creator isolation
Pure logic module crates/nexus-orchestration/src/auto_chain.rs (ChainAction enum, evaluate_next_step, 15 unit tests + DB helpers)
ScheduleSupervisor.on_schedule_terminal → process_auto_chain_after_terminal → enqueue_auto_chain_schedule (shared helper, W-A) → enqueue next stage / next chapter schedule

Shared enqueue helper (W-A): enqueue_auto_chain_schedule(pool, creator_id, work_id, stage, chapter, work) is the single source of truth for ACH ID mint + INSERT + set_driver, used by both supervisor and boot paths

Boot auto-resume in crates/nexus-daemon-runtime/src/boot.rs: find_resumable_works → for each interrupted work, re-fetch + evaluate_next_step + enqueue_next_schedule; preserves existing resume_running_as_paused for non-checkpoint schedules
Side-input single FL-E driver invariant (T6): 409 Conflict on creator run continue --note when active driver schedule exists for the same Work; inspiration visible in status
CLI status fields (T7): auto_chain_enabled, auto_chain_interrupted, driver_schedule_id, pending_inspiration surfaced via creator run status
CLI creator run resume <work_id> (T8) for manual recovery when not auto-resumed on boot
--auto-chain (default true) / --no-auto-chain flag on creator run start (T4) writes auto_chain_enabled to Work creation body

patch_work_stage atomicity fix (W-D): stage transition validated and run BEFORE non-stage field application; if stage advance fails, no non-stage fields are persisted; non-atomicity between the two operations documented with NOTE
Boot resume partial index (W-E): CREATE INDEX works_auto_chain_resume ON works(auto_chain_enabled, auto_chain_interrupted, status) WHERE auto_chain_enabled = 1

21 hermetic integration tests in crates/nexus-orchestration/tests/auto_chain.rs (14 initial + 4 fix1_* + 3 fix2_*) covering AC1..AC6, work completion, single-FL-E invariant, side-input 409, --no-auto-chain, checkpoint persistence, boot resume / no-resumable / interrupted
2 unit tests for shared enqueue helper (success + typed InvalidState error)
1 hermetic test for patch_work_stage fail-fast reorder (W-D) — stage_advance_failure_does_not_apply_non_stage_fields
1 hermetic test for boot-resume partial index existence (W-E) — queries sqlite_master
3 pre-existing clippy issues fixed in same slice: redundant_closure_for_method_calls (creator/run.rs), missing auto-chain fields in 2 test fixtures (host_tool_executor.rs, agent_tool_api.rs)
Deferred tracker DF-53/DF-68/DF-40 disposition updated (T10): implemented in V1.39 P0
deferred_residuals: R-V139P0-W-B (low) — ACH timestamp ID format %Y%m%d%H%M%S%3f lacks entropy; defer to V1.40 hygiene
R-V139P0-W-C (low) — creator run resume only clears auto_chain_interrupted, no synchronous nudge; defer to V1.40 hygiene
R-V139P0-W-F (low) — tick_inner loads ALL creator_schedules rows regardless of status; defer to V1.40 hygiene
R-V139P0-S1 (low/nit) — patch_work_stage reorder test is atomic-function-level; suggest integration test (qc3 S-1 re-review)
R-V139P0-S2 (low/nit) — boot-resume index planner usage not empirically confirmed; suggest EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN assertion (qc3 S-2 re-review)
